log_entries.thought_preview: The malware is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader or runtime module, with a size of 8770 bytes. It has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes, including CAPA and VirusTotal. I should investigate furthe
The malware has dropped 3 files, created 1 process, and made no registry persistence keys. It has also made 2 DNS lookups to unique domains. I should investigate the files dropped to understand their

The malware has dropped 3 files, all of which are PE_EXE files. Two of the files have the same name, 'budha.exe', but different paths and hashes. This suggests that the malware may be using a techniqu

The malware creates a process 'budha.exe' in the 'C:\DOCUME~1\<USER>~1\LOCALS~1\Temp\' directory, but the command line arguments are empty. The notable modules loaded by the process include several Wi

The malware makes DNS lookups to two unique domains, '3horses.com.hk' and 'ruedigerbaltissen.com', but does not establish any HTTP conversations. It also sends UDP traffic to the machine's DNS server.
